summary: Career Suite P0 Features - Comprehensive testing completed. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All tabs rendering correctly with required UI elements. Fixed critical bug: Job Tracker status constraint mismatch (wishlist → saved).
test_credentials: No auth required. All endpoints work with anonymous user_id. Supabase keys in backend/.env.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for cleanup identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Career Suite P0 features fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/career/v2/resumes (returns resume_id), GET /api/career/v2/resumes/{id}/export/pdf|docx (returns valid PDF/DOCX), POST /api/career/v2/cover-letters (returns cover_letter_id), GET /api/career/v2/cover-letters/{id}/export/pdf|docx, POST /api/career/v2/upload/headshot|background (returns URL), GET /api/career/v2/uploads/{file_id} (serves image), GET /api/career/v2/tracker (returns kanban with saved/applied/phone_screen/rejected columns), POST /api/career/v2/tracker (adds job), GET /api/career/jobs/search?query=... (returns job results). Frontend tabs: Overview (8 cards), Job Search (search form), Tracker (Kanban + Quick Add), Resume (Autofill from DNA, headshot/background upload, Save & AI Enhance), Cover Letter (Direct/Storytelling/Technical styles), Signatures (Copy HTML button).

bugs_fixed.root_cause: Supabase check constraint on job_applications.status column only allows: saved, applied, phone_screen, rejected. Backend code was using 'wishlist' as default which is not a valid status.
bugs_fixed.fix_applied: Changed default status from 'wishlist' to 'saved' in backend/routers/career_suite.py line 475. Updated kanban columns to match valid Supabase statuses. Updated frontend career-suite.js to use 'saved' instead of 'wishlist'.

bugs_fixed.issue: Frontend JavaScript syntax error - initCareerSuite is not defined
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Duplicate code block in csShowToast function causing syntax error
bugs_fixed.fix_applied: Removed duplicate closing braces in career-suite.js line 1513

GET /api/career/v2/resumes/{id}/export/docx - Returns valid DOCX with PK header (200)
POST /api/career/v2/cover-letters - Creates cover letter, returns cover_letter_id (200)
